hero.title: Interactive Learning
hero.description: Artemis brings interactive learning to life with instant, individual feedback on programming exercises, quizzes, modeling tasks, and more. Offering customization for instructors and real-time collaboration for students, this platform bridges creativity and education. Embrace a new era of engaging, adaptive learning with Artemis, where innovation meets inclusivity.
hero.subtitle: Artemis is open-source. Meet the future of educational excellence.
hero.usedBy: Trusted by Premier Academic Institutions and Educators

ai.title: AI That Supports Learning And Teaching
ai.description:
Artemis integrates AI across the entire teaching workflow —
from personalized tutoring and competency tracking to automated assessment and exercise generation.

assessment.title: Assessment That Works In Real Courses
assessment.description: From programming exercises with built-in CI to secure online exams, Artemis covers the full assessment surface area of technical courses.

platform.title: Course Delivery, Integrity, And Scale
platform.description: Artemis goes beyond assignments with integrated lecture delivery, real-time communication, plagiarism detection, and learning analytics.

summary.heading: One platform for teaching, assessment, and academic integrity
summary.description: Artemis combines AI-assisted learning, scalable assessment workflows, integrated teaching tools, and course operations in a single system for modern technical education.

ai.title: AI
ai.description: Personalized guidance, competency tracking, automated assessment support, and exercise generation.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.description: From programming and quiz exercises to modeling, text, and secure online exams.

teaching.title: Teaching
teaching.description: Lecture content, communication, and guided support throughout the course.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: Integrity, scale, and open infrastructure for running large technical courses.

iris.title: Your Personal AI Tutor
iris.description: Context-aware AI assistant that reads your code, understands your errors, and guides you to the solution without giving away the answer.

bullets.0: Five specialized assistance modes for different learning contexts
bullets.1: Proactive support when build and test feedback indicates the student is stuck

atlas.title: Adaptive Learning Paths
atlas.description: Personalized competency tracking that helps students understand where they stand and what to focus on next.

bullets.0: Fine-grained learning objectives linked to exercises and lectures
bullets.1: Visual progress dashboards for students and instructors
bullets.2: Automatic recommendations based on individual performance

athena.title: AI-Powered Assessment
athena.description: Machine learning models that analyze submissions and suggest feedback, reducing grading time while maintaining quality.

bullets.0: Automatic feedback suggestions for text and modeling exercises

hyperion.title: AI Exercise Generation
hyperion.description: Generate and refine exercises using large language models, turning ideas into complete, deployable assignments in minutes.

bullets.0: Create programming exercises from natural language descriptions
bullets.1: Automatic test case and solution generation

programming.title: Programming Exercises
programming.description: Integrated development environment with built-in Git hosting, continuous integration, and automated feedback for multiple programming languages.

bullets.0: Built-in Git and CI — no external services required
bullets.1: Instant feedback through test results and static code analysis
bullets.2: Support for Java, Python, C, Kotlin, Swift, and more

git.title: Artemis Git
git.description: Built-in Git hosting provisions starter, solution, and student repositories with access rules applied automatically.

ci.title: Artemis CI
ci.description: Continuous integration pipelines run directly in Artemis, delivering automated feedback without managing external servers.

batteries.title: Batteries Included
batteries.description: No external CI/CD integrations are needed or supported; set up courses in minutes with everything running inside Artemis.

programming.programmingLanguages: Works with all programming languages, such as

quiz.title: Quiz Exercises
quiz.description: Versatile quiz engine supporting multiple question formats with instant automated grading and detailed result analytics.

bullets.0: Multiple-choice, drag-and-drop, and short-answer question types
bullets.1: Live quizzes with real-time participation tracking
bullets.2: Automatic grading with configurable scoring rules

modeling.title: Modeling & Text Exercises
modeling.description: Interactive diagram exercises and free-text submissions with AI-assisted semi-automatic assessment.

bullets.0: UML diagram editor with automatic layout and visual feedback
bullets.1: Free-text exercises with NLP-powered feedback suggestions
bullets.2: Semi-automatic assessment learns from instructor corrections

exams.title: Comprehensive Exam Mode
exams.description: Conduct secure online exams with exercise variants, integrated plagiarism detection, and structured grading workflows.

bullets.0: Unique exam variants per student with randomized exercise order
bullets.1: Built-in plagiarism detection and test runs
bullets.2: Detailed statistics and student review process

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Evaluate exam outcomes using detailed statistics generated by Artemis, including performance metrics and exercise difficulty analysis.
statistics.usingMetrics: Review the students' performance using various metrics such as average, median, and standard deviation.
statistics.studentFeedback: Review the students' perceived difficulty of every exercise to improve exams in the future.

automaticAssessment.title: Machine-learning Assisted Assessment
automaticAssessment.description: Artemis supports correction with automatic and semi-automatic assessments for various exercise types.
automaticAssessment.automate: For quiz exercises, you may specify the correct solution in advance. After conducting an exam, you can prompt Artemis to automatically evaluate all submissions.
automaticAssessment.quality: For text and modeling exercises, you can activate automatic correction suggestions. Artemis uses machine learning to identify similar elements across submissions.

lectures.title: Lecture Integration
lectures.description: Deliver structured course content with slides, videos, and learning units linked to exercises and competencies.

bullets.0: Upload lecture slides and embed video content
bullets.1: Organize content into learning units with clear objectives
bullets.2: Link units to exercises and competencies for a connected learning experience

communication.title: Real-Time Communication
communication.description: Course-wide channels, exercise-specific discussions, and direct messaging keep students and instructors connected.

bullets.0: Dedicated channels per lecture, exercise, and exam
bullets.2: Threaded discussions with reactions and mentions

integrity.title: Academic Integrity & Learning Analytics
integrity.description: Comprehensive tools for maintaining academic standards and understanding student learning patterns at scale.

bullets.0: Integrated JPlag-based plagiarism detection for code, text, and modeling
bullets.1: Detailed insights into student performance, engagement, and course-wide trends
bullets.2: Data-driven feedback to improve teaching and course design

plagiarism.title: Plagiarism Detection
plagiarism.description: Integrated JPlag-based detection for code, text, and modeling submissions with similarity analysis and side-by-side comparison.

analytics.title: Learning Analytics
analytics.description: Detailed dashboards showing student performance, engagement patterns, and course-wide trends to inform teaching decisions.

cta.title: Empower Your Courses
cta.subtitle: Transform your teaching and enrich student experience with Artemis today.
